itemTypeTooltip: Refers to the context of mBOM Items involving fasteners
fastenerHandlingTypeTooltip: The criteria classifying the kind of fastener
fastenerStrategyTooltip: Defines condition on Fastener occurrence Manufacturing Strategy.
fastenerCategoryTooltip: Defines condition on Fastener occurrence Manufacturing Category.
fastenerStackingConditionTooltip:
Defines condition on the order in the stacking of the Product Occurrence. 
The condition on this column is always satisfied if table cell value is “Any”.
“Last” is the value corresponding to the stack size (Number of fasteners).
fastenerDiameterConditionTooltip:
Defines conditions on Fastener reference diameter. 
The condition on this column is always satisfied if table cell value is “Any”.
fastenerItemTooltip: Defines the object to be created based on criteria defined in the above fields.
fastenerItemParameterTooltip: Defines the parameter of the object to be created based on criteria defined. Only applicable for “Provide” and “Pre drill” objects.
Info: Create and edit Rules here and click OK. It will save the Rule in the database.
ErrorRuleAlreadyDefined: Entered value for %1 already present. Please choose different name for %2
createDuplicate: %1 new duplicates of Fastener Rules with %2 Item Type and %3 Fastener Strategy will be created. Proceed?
createDuplicateByFillingForm:
%1 new duplicates of Fastener Rules with %2 Item Type and %3 Fastener Strategy will be created.
The Fastener Rule filled out by the form will be deployed as well. Proceed?
partiallyDeployedTitle: Partial deployment occurred due to existing identical parameters.
existingParameter: Duplication of parameters did not occur due to existing parameters.
